major_findings.problem: The safe-line branch asks for one visible step while the line is two steps from the elevator glass, causing impossible folded movement on paths without prior movement.
major_findings.fix_direction: Track prior movement or revise the safe-line branch to request enough movement from the current position.

required_revisions: Fix the safe-line distance/state inconsistency so branch-04-safe-line-step works from every folded path.
